files.title: Ov Moi Omm Discography part two ( 2016 2022)

metadata.creator: Ov Moi Omm
metadata.description:
“Mellow Psychedelic Experimental Noize for What Might Ever Be left Ov Your Soul in These Modern Day Timez”

Ov (of; [uhv, ov; unstressed uh v or, esp. before consonants, uh] used to indicate apposition or identity)

Moi [mwa; (valeur emphatique)]

Omm [ōm/ōm (noun - A mystic syllable, considered the most sacred mantra in Hinduism and Tibetan Buddhism. It appears at the beginning and end of most Sanskrit recitations, prayers, and texts) Om, or Aum (written with the generic Devanagari symbol ॐ; or spelled out in Devanagari as ओं oṃ [õː], औं auṃ [ə̃ũ], or ओ३म् om [õːm]; and occasionally written in the Tibetan form ༀ)]

Mellow psychedelic experimental noise formed out of the initial ashes of the initial Omniman during the mild Canadian winter of 2009. Ov Moi Omm originally began as a vehicle for exploration. An exploration that explored experimental ideas. Musical ideas that were influenced by a variety of different musical genres that could be found throughout the known world. Sounds with that happened by chance and coincidence. Landscapes would turn into soundscapes and soundscapes would turn into landscapes; the compositions try to defy classic structures and rely heavily upon "sound" collage.

Ov Moi Omm is also a further vehicle (umbrella) for the musical exploration of the following acts: Omniman (II); Irama Gema; 10 Echo; Polyphony Più; Ihsan & the Cabinet of Dr. Caligari; Yellow Omm (a collaborative effort between Ov Moi Omm and Yellow Sunshine Microdot Happiness Band (YSMHB); Pulse Burst and Julia Felix. These acts can often appear alongside Ov Moi Omm and are definitely a apart of the Ov Moi Omm universe and experience.

Discography Part Two:

2016 - Minor Collection Ov Assorted Pieces Volume VII

2016 – How to Time Travel

2017 - Eras & Phases 2015-2016

2018 – Ideology

2019 - Decennium Recollections & Curiosities of Compilation - The Ep's

2019 - Decennium Recollections & Curiosities of Compilation - The Lp's

2021 – Interovmoiommosis (ep)

2021 - Accumulations


Yellow Omm:

Yellow Omm is a mutual collaborative effort between two Canadian entities, Ov Moi Omm and The Yellow Sunshine Microdot Happiness Band (YSMHB). The collaboration had initially began somewhere near the shores of Lake Ontario in the summer of 2012. Yellow Omm periodically releases experimental efforts which explore different musical realms of electronic music, jazz, industrial, noise and other genres.

Discography:

2012 – “Good Times” (ep)

2013 - IdeaWave (ep)

2014 - Emanations Ov the Sophia

2014 - Konx Om Pax

2015 - A Comprehensive Guide to Yellow Omm

2016 - On the Influence of Melodies of the Soul

2017 - Deciphering Quixotic Dimensions

2017 - Rodeo Gal (single)

2018 - Desedimentation (ep)

2020 - Yellow Omm/Irama Gema Split (ep)


The Akashic Series:

The Akashic series is a collection of various artist compilations containing selected tracks from artists within the Ov Moi Omm universe. The Akashic series is an auditory compendium of musical events, thoughts and intent ever to have occurred – past, present or future – in the Ov Moi Omm universe.

(Akasha or Akash (Sanskrit ākāśa आकाश) meaning air, sky, space or æther in traditional Indian cosmology, adopted by 19th century Western Occultist, spiritualist with its meaning changing with different Religions such as Hinduism and Jainism.)

Featuring music from:

Omniman/Omniman II; 10 Echo; Julia Felix; Ov Moi Omm; Pulse Burst; Ihsan & The Cabinet of Dr. Caligari; Irama Gema; Yellow Omm; Polyphony Più; and The Yellow Sunshine Microdot Happiness Band (YSMHB)

Discography:

2012 - The Akashic Record (Volume I)

2014 - Further Readings ov the Aether (Volume II)

2015 - Vibrational Akashic Memorandum (of Every Soul and Its Peregrination)   (Volume III)

2018 - Compendium of the Akashic Processions and Ancillaries (Volume IV)

2021 - The Akashic Series Anthology 2012 – 2018

2021 - Navigation through the Quantum Akashic Fields (Volume V)
